title: UltraFPS
description: A specialized performance client bridging version gaps for Fabric 1.21.x, featuring advanced entity models, dynamic visuals, and optimized FPS.
body:
🌐 Hybrid Performance & Visuals (Fabric 1.21.x)
This modpack is a carefully assembled collection of tools designed for the Minecraft 1.21.x ecosystem. It bridges the gap between recent sub-versions 1.21.11, selecting the most stable and feature-rich versions of each mod to ensure a seamless "Vanilla+" experience.

⚡ Multi-Version Optimization
We have tested and selected specific builds to provide maximum stability across the 1.21 branch:

Engine: Powered by the latest Sodium and Lithium stack for 1.21.11 compatibility.

Resource Management: Includes Dynamic FPS and FpsReducer2 to handle background resource allocation efficiently.

Culling Tech: Uses Entity Culling to ensure high frame rates even in complex environments.

🎨 Enhanced Visual Identity
Next-Gen Models: Features Entity Model Features (EMF) and Entity Texture Features (ETF) for 1.21.11, allowing for complex animations and textures without OptiFine.

Environmental Detail: Falling Leaves provides an atmospheric touch, making forests feel alive and dynamic.

Lighting: Sodium Dynamic Lights allows for real-time illumination from held items.

🛠 Utility & Interface
Advanced Navigation: Zoomify (1.21.11-compatible) and BetterF3 (1.21.11) provide the best tools for exploration and debugging.

Information HUD: AppleSkin provides vital hunger and saturation data.

Integrated Browser: Resourcify allows you to update your look without leaving the game menu.

📋 Compatibility & Environment
Environment: This is a Client-Side modpack. It is designed to work on any server (Vanilla, Paper, Fabric).
